nodes.name: 鸕鶿科
nodes.summary: 鸕鶿科（Phalacrocoracidae）是图谱中的科级分类节点，当前关联27种鸟类，如Crowned cormorant、Reed cormorant、Little pied cormorant等27种鸟类。

nodes.name: 湿地
nodes.summary: 浅水、沼泽与植被斑块组成的高生产力生态系统。

nodes.name: 鲣鸟目
nodes.summary: 鲣鸟目（Suliformes）是图谱中的目级分类节点，当前关联42种鸟类，如白斑军舰鸟、麗色軍艦鳥、白腹军舰鸟等42种鸟类。

nodes.name: Australian pied cormorant
nodes.summary: Australian pied cormorant（Australian pied cormorant，学名 Phalacrocorax varius），分类上属于鲣鸟目，并归入鸕鶿科，在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，常见栖息地包括湿地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: Department of Conservation, Wellington, New Zealand. Birds in colonies can often be observed entangled in recreational fishing line with hooks embedded in the body. In the past, the pied cormorant was seen as competition for commercial fishing and sometimes shot. center|frameless|880x880px|Distribution of pied cormorant in Australia and New Zealand and the population trends in New Zealand Although typically found in marine habitat—sometimes solitary, sometimes in pairs, sometimes in vast flocks of hundreds or thousands—it is also attracted to inland waters, including lakes, deep and open wetlands, and rivers. In Australia, the birds can often be found at inland waterways while in New Zealand it prefers coastal areas close to its prey. Adult birds are sedentary and can often be seen roosting in trees, on rocks or logs in the water
